name: cds95-classroom
description: CDS95 원작 체감형 항해 BGM·역사 지명 오류 수정·메시나 해협 양방향 통항 보정 실시간 학습 플랫폼

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check public/js/terrain.js && node --check public/js/ocean-current.js && node --check public/js/wind.js && node --check public/js/bgm.js && node --check lib/mission-catalog.js && node --check lib/classroom-store.js && node --check lib/fatigue.js && node --check lib/arrival-zones.js && node --check lib/completion-rewards.js && node --check lib/final-quiz.js && npm run check:catalog && npm run check:html
scripts.check:catalog: node -e "for (const f of ['places','original-cities','items','templates','ready-missions','arrival-zones']) JSON.parse(require('node:fs').readFileSync('data/catalog/'+f+'.json','utf8')); console.log('catalog JSON ok')"
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run test:terrain && npm run test:arrival-zones && npm run test:v23 && npm run test:v23:current && npm run test:current-visual && npm run test:wind && npm run test:v42 && npm run test:v43 && npm run test:v44 && npm run test:v45 && npm run test:v46 && npm run test:v47 && npm run test:v48 && npm run test:v49 && npm run test:v50 && npm run test:v51 && npm run test:v52 && npm run test:v53 && npm run test:v54 && npm run test:v55 && npm run test:v56 && npm run test:v57 && npm run test:v58 && npm run test:v59 && npm run test:v60 && npm run test:v61 && npm run test:v66 && npm run test:v70 && npm run test:v71 && npm run test:v72 && npm run test:v73 && npm run test:v74
scripts.test:v36:smoke: node tests/completion-rewards-unit.js && node tests/teacher-map-privacy-unit.js && node tests/v35-completion-free-roam-smoke.js
